# QA Plan: Baltic v3 Content Expansion Program (S73–S80)

**Date:** 2026-06-25  
**Generated by:** /qa-plan (using subagent-driven-development for extraction/classification/GDD review)  
**Scope:** Full Baltic v3 program (S73-S80) — ~28-31 tracks/stories across 8 serial sprints (from roadmap-execute-plan-062526.01.md §4 and sprint-7{3-80} plans; primary "stories" are the numbered tracks like S73-01, S74-01/02, S78-01/02, S79-01/02, S80-01/02). No traditional fine-grained story files in production/epics/ for this program; tracks map to content (policies/OOB/catalog/goldens/manifest), UI (C2 picker/bands), integration (batch/replay/gates/closeouts/GitNexus), manual (human sessions/sign-off), config (boundary/briefings).  
**Engine:** .NET 8 (headless sim + Unity adapter optional for C2/UI; BalticReplayHarness / BalticBatchRunner patterns)  
**Sprint Files:** production/sprints/sprint-7{3-80}-*.md + production/sprint-status.yaml + roadmap-execute-plan-062526.01.md + future-sprint-roadpmap-062526.01.md  
**Authority / Citation:** production/baltic-v3-scope-boundary-2026-06-25.md (S73-01 + S73–S80); docs/reports/roadmap-execute-plan-062526.01.md §3/4/5/9; docs/reports/future-sprint-roadpmap-062526.01.md §3/6/7/10; docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-25-baltic-v3-content-expansion-design.md; AGENTS.md. All artifacts must cite these. Stage remains Release throughout. v2 frozen (read-only); additive baltic-v3-* only.

**Baseline (from S79/S80 pre + history RUN+READ):** build 0e/0w; tests 1232/0f (279 Sim +43 Cli +247 Del +5 Excel +252 UA +406 Data monotonic); ReplayGolden 6/6+; C2 proxy 18/18; hash 17144800277401907079 preserved (v2 goldens only); ZERO DelegationBridge hotpath=0; GitNexus 20496 nodes / 38203 edges / 2516 files; impacts CRITICAL §5 exact 178 (CatalogWriteGate extend-only), 97 (PatrolCandidateEngagePolicy), 127 (DelegationBridge), 52 (BalticReplayHarness).

**Classification notes:** Types inferred from track AC/DoD/descriptions + GDD formulas (e.g. Pd=clamp01(basePd*env*...), effective=merge(...), fingerprint=SHA256(concat...), score=..., worldHash_tick=..., Pd draw from SeededRng). No explicit `Type:` field in any source (gap: all inferred; flag for future stories). Conservative: prefer Integration for mixed (e.g. replay + verification = Integration). Dominant: Config/Data (policies, manifests, OOB, catalog, boundary, stubs — "limited to data files/configuration"); Integration (~half: goldens/replay/batch/gates/closeouts/GitNexus — "two or more systems... persistence"); UI (S78 C2 per command-and-control-ui GDD); Manual (S79-03/S80-02 human). All cite boundary + execute-plan + relevant GDDs (policy-roe-emcon-wra, order-log-replay, sensor-detection-ew, command-and-control-ui, scoring-losses, agentic-infrastructure, simulation-core-time). Total ~30 entries (grouped 01/02 where plans do; expanded for coverage).

## Automated Tests Required

### S73-01 Scope boundary / S73-02 Playtest manifest v3 / S74-01/02/03 Patrol/Mission/Difficulty policies / S75-01/02 OOB/theater / S76-01/02 Mission events / S77-01/02 Catalog slices / S76-03 Briefing stubs (Config/Data group)
**Test file path:** `tests/unit/content/baltic-v3-policy-manifest-validation_test.cs` (or data validation in harness)
**What to test:**
- Policy JSON structure + effective=merge(scenarioDefault, side, group, mission...) per policy-roe-emcon-wra GDD (field-wise last non-inherit wins; enum order determinism).
- Manifest schema (v3_slots list, bands A/B/C per difficulty-curve.md + design §3/5, all_scenarios_v3, batch seeds/ticks/v3Enabled, sourceGoldens).
- Isolated baltic-v3-* prefix only; no v2 mutation; CatalogWriteGate extend-only (no direct write in content tracks).
- From GDDs: Pd = clamp01(basePd(db, sensor, target, range) * envMask * eccmFactor * (1 - jamStrength)) for related sensor context in policies; effective ROE/WRA/EMCON resolution.

**Edge cases to cover:**
- Zero/min values (e.g., 0 Pd, empty slots).
- Boundary (max salvo, rangeBand, allowedCategories per WRA).
- Invalid (null target, dead entity, EMCON Off + active radar).
- Determinism: same seed + sorted → identical (from simulation-core-time GDD).
- From policy GDD Edge Cases: side weapons tight + mission free (mission wins); hold fire + agent Aggressive (ROE_HOLD_FIRE); max salvo violation; mid-fight ROE change (PolicyUpdate logged).

**Estimated test count:** ~20–30 (schema + merge logic + band mapping).

*No formula found in some referenced GDD for pure manifest — test cases derived from ACs + policy-roe-emcon-wra + difficulty-curve. Review GDD Formulas before writing.*

### S74-04 / S75-03 / S76-01/02 / S79-01/02 Isolated goldens + batch / replay (Integration group)
**Test file path:** `tests/integration/replay/baltic-v3-golden-batch_test.cs` (extend existing ReplayGoldenSuiteTests / BalticReplayHarness)
**What to test:**
- New isolated `replay-golden-baltic-v3-*.txt` family (new WORLD_HASH/fingerprints); fingerprint = SHA256(concat entry.CanonicalBytes() ordered by sequenceId) from order-log-replay GDD.
- Batch runner against full v3 manifest (6 slots x seeds [42,7,123]; ticks per manifest; mvpEngagement); output capture (scores.csv, orderlog-evidence with EngagementOutcome, REPLAY_CHECKPOINT, MESSAGE=KILL_CONFIRMED etc.).
- Determinism: same seed + policy → identical WorldHash / fingerprint / DecisionLog (simulation-core-time GDD: draw = SeededRng.UnitFloat(...); detectionSubhash / engageMix / worldHash_tick).
- C2 proxy 18/18 + replay 6/6+ unchanged; no prod hash regression.
- From GDDs: AC-1 same scenarioSeed + policy → identical unified WorldHash + replay fingerprint; AC-6 replay-verify PASS on golden; Pd draw + ContactChange in log; PolicyDenial sequenceId match.

**Edge cases to cover:**
- From order-log-replay GDD: log append during replay (forbidden); duplicate sequenceId (reject); empty log (scoring zero); agent with no decisions (valid no AgentDecision rows).
- From sensor/policy: EMCON Off mid-tick; jammer destroyed; maxSalvo; hold fire + WRA.
- From scoring: duplicate kill (dedupe by engagementId); intercept (expenditure no kill credit).
- From simulation-core: catch-up after pause; mid-scenario seed change (forbidden); zero entities (tick for timers).

**Estimated test count:** ~15–25 (new goldens + batch harness + determinism properties).

### S77-03 Platform Editor / S78-01/02 C2 picker + bands (UI + Integration)
**Test file path:** `tests/integration/c2/baltic-v3-picker-ui_test.cs` (headless roundtrip + C2 proxy harness)
**What to test:**
- Picker reads v3 manifest (v3_slots, bands A/B/C); displays baltic-v3-* with band labels/tooltips.
- Excel round-trip import/export/diff for catalog slices (additive baltic-v3-*; no break to CatalogWriteGate).
- C2 proxy (PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests) 18/18 no regression (additive only per command-and-control-ui GDD ACs: drawer tabs, message log, no bridge exceptions; UI assemblies use adapter projections only).
- From GDDs: AC-1 Play Mode smoke; AC-2 UI no Sim engage internals; AC-3 wireframe zones; keyboard focus; refresh <100ms.

**Edge cases to cover:**
- From command-and-control-ui: zero contacts (empty list); destroyed unit (DESTROYED; actions disabled); replay mode (read-only); high symbols (LOD).
- From policy/sensor: passive radar + illuminate (EMCON_RADAR_PASSIVE); no FIRE_CONTROL_TRACK.
- From order-log: scrub to Engagement shows correct state.

**Estimated test count:** ~10 (UI load + roundtrip + proxy no-regress).

### S73-03/04 / S74-05 / ... Closeouts / S79-01/02 Batch / S80-01 Gate (Integration verification group)
**Test file path:** `tests/integration/gates/baltic-v3-full-verif_test.cs` (extend existing harness + smoke)
**What to test:**
- Full gates: build 0e/0w; tests 1232/0f monotonic; replay 6/6+; C2 18/18; hash preserved; ZERO=0; GitNexus list/detect/impact exact CRITs.
- Batch/goldens integration (S79 outputs + S74/S75/S76 goldens); manifest + index updates.
- S80 gate: confirm S73–S79 closeouts, index in evidence/baltic-v3-playtest-index.md, playtest sign-off, GitNexus CRIT match.
- From GDDs: ACs for determinism (same seed identical hash/fingerprint), policy eval, sensor Pd, scoring match log, replay-verify.

**Edge cases to cover:**
- All from above GDDs + boundary (mid-tick EMCON/WRA; max salvo; zero Pd; duplicate kills; log append forbidden; etc.).
- From agentic: batch partial failure (score=-1 + error); AAR diff vs golden.

**Estimated test count:** ~20–30 (gate harness + S80 checklist automation + cross-sprint).

*No formula in some GDDs for pure gates — derived from ACs + order-log-replay / simulation-core-time / policy GDDs.*

## Manual QA Checklist

### S73-01/02 Boundary + Manifest / S74-01/02/03 Policies / S75-01/02 OOB / S76-01/02/03 Events+Stubs / S77-01/02 Catalog (Config/Data group)
**Verification method:** Doc / data review + sign-off (qa-lead / designer)
**Who must sign off:** qa-lead + boundary owner
**Evidence to capture:** Side-by-side vs v2; manifest screenshot; policy JSON snippets

Checklist:
- [ ] All cites present (boundary + execute-plan §3/4/5/9 + design + future-roadmap + AGENTS + commercial supersede for S73+)
- [ ] v3_slots / bands / policies additive baltic-v3-* only (no v2 touch)
- [ ] Manifest extends v2 structure; defines slots/bands per design §2/3 + difficulty-curve.md
- [ ] OOB/catalog slices match S74/S75 policies (additive)
- [ ] Briefing stubs / mission events integrate (reference in events)
- [ ] GitNexus pre + low detect documented

### S78-01/02/03 C2 picker + bands + tooltips (UI group)
**Verification method:** Manual step-through + screenshot + C2 proxy smoke + lead sign-off
**Who must sign off:** unity-ui-specialist / ux-designer / qa-lead
**Evidence to capture:** Screenshots of picker (v3 manifest loaded, bands A/B/C, tooltips); video of C2 load/selection; C2 proxy 18/18 logs

Checklist:
- [ ] Picker reads v3 manifest (slots/bands/sources from baltic-v3-scenario-manifest.yaml)
- [ ] Displays baltic-v3-* with correct band labels (A NPE/easy, B mid, C hard/stress per design/difficulty-curve.md)
- [ ] Tooltips for player guidance (per manifest + GDD command-and-control-ui)
- [ ] C2 proxy 18/18 no regression (PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests; additive only)
- [ ] Keyboard focus / drawer / message log work (per command-and-control-ui ACs)
- [ ] No Sim internals in UI (adapter projections only)

### S74-04 / S75-03 / S76 goldens / S79 batch / S80 gate (Integration verification)
**Verification method:** Full gates RUN+READ + smoke check + sign-off
**Who must sign off:** c-sharp-devops-engineer / qa-lead
**Evidence to capture:** Verif logs (build/test/replay/C2/hash/ZERO); gate artifact; index update; GitNexus MCP outputs

Checklist:
- [ ] All gates PASS (0e/1232/0f/6/6+/18/18/hash v2-only/ZERO=0)
- [ ] GitNexus pre (20496/38203 + detect low + impacts 178/97/127/52 exact)
- [ ] v3 goldens isolated (new fingerprints/WORLD_HASH; no prod hash regression)
- [ ] S73–S79 closeouts PASS (per smokes/status)
- [ ] v3 manifest + goldens indexed in evidence/baltic-v3-playtest-index.md
- [ ] Playtest sign-off (auto + ≥1 human per band)
- [ ] S80 gate artifact complete vs exit criteria
- [ ] All cites + boundary/execute-plan/roadmaps

### S79-03 Human sessions / S80-02 Sign-off (Manual group)
**Verification method:** Playtest session + written notes + sign-off
**Who must sign off:** qa-tester / qa-lead / producer
**Evidence to capture:** production/playtests/human/*.md (think-aloud, logs, verdicts, quotes); gate review notes; ack in status/stage

Checklist:
- [ ] Human session template used
- [ ] ≥1 session per band (A/B/C from manifest + design/difficulty-curve.md)
- [ ] Artifacts in production/playtests/human/
- [ ] Human ack "Baltic v3 content-complete"
- [ ] Optional promote default no noted
- [ ] Stage remains Release

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this program (S80 gate emphasis):

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (headless + Unity adapter)
2. New game / new session can be started with v3 manifest
3. Full v3 manifest load (6 slots, bands A/B/C, batch config)
4. Automated batch against full v3 (18+ runs; scores/orderlogs)
5. Replay determinism (6/6+ goldens; fingerprints match; hash v2 preserved)
6. C2 proxy 18/18 (picker, bands, tooltips; additive only)
7. Save / load cycle (if applicable; worldHash / seed / log preserved)
8. Performance within budget (no spikes on target; batch throughput)
9. GitNexus pre + impacts exact on CRITICALs (178/97/127/52)
10. S80 gate: all exit criteria (closeouts, index, sign-off, baselines, CRITs)

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check`. Reference this + S80 gate artifact.*

| Story/Track | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------------|---------------|--------------|--------------------|
| S79-03 Human session template | Validate template usability + per-band coverage (A NPE/easy 10-15min; B mid 20-30min; C hard/stress) | 3 (1 per band) | New + experienced (per design/difficulty-curve.md) |
| S78-01/02/03 C2 picker + bands + tooltips | UI responsiveness + tooltip clarity + manifest-driven selection | 2 | Experienced (C2 proxy focus) |
| S80-01/02 Gate / sign-off | Confirm playtest index + auto/human sign-off completeness | 1 (review) | qa-lead + producer |

**Sign-off requirement:** Playtest notes to `production/session-logs/playtest-[sprint]-[track-slug].md` (or human/ artifacts) reviewed by qa-lead / producer before mark COMPLETE. Use .claude/skills/playtest-report.

If no playtest: *N/A — S79 human + S80 review covered; prior S73–S78 had no additional playtest mandates beyond baseline.*

## Definition of Done — This Program

A track/story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at specified path for all Logic and Integration tracks
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI tracks
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` or S80 gate before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (baselines 1232/0f/6/6+/18/18/hash/ZERO)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via /code-review or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story/track file updated to Status: Complete (via /story-done equivalent)
- [ ] All cites to boundary + execute-plan + roadmaps + design + AGENTS.md present
- [ ] GitNexus pre + verification-before RUN+READ documented
